rationale.agent-scope-drift: Quantifies agent constraint violations, deception, autonomous failures; Replit off-mandate spine
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Own empirical CWE vulnerability evidence across six code-generation models
rationale.ai-review: Cross-model validation, LLM-judge hallucination detectors; argues Verification Gap limits
rationale.rules-based-checks: Argues guardrails, sandboxing, runtime verification, test pipelines as controls
rationale.formal-methods: Classical verification's scalability-feasibility gap; hybrid verification research direction
rationale.risk-routing: Behavior taxonomy tiers oversight; differentiated validation by command criticality
rationale.hitl-workflow: Advocates approval gates and write/delete staging for critical actions
rationale.oversight-explanation: Explainability pillar: XAI supporting developer trust calibration of outputs
rationale.provenance-auditability: Immutable audit trails, risk-aware logging for human post-mortem review
rationale.org-governance: Ethical escalation protocols, roles, enterprise governance framework comparison
rationale.regulatory-compliance: Aligns SAFE-AI with EU AI Act, AIDA, NIST RMF
rationale.metrics: Defines deception/failure/severity metrics; measurands: security, quality
